{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.2": 4,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent's edits improved the clarity and flow of the text, but did not significantly address conceptual issues or propose reframing.",
    "R1.2": "The agent identified some consistency issues, but did not thoroughly walk the argument chain or propose minimal repairs.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flagged uncertainty for several claims, but could have been more explicit about confidence and missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "The output was mostly within scope with one minor drift (the discussion of schema documentation).",
    "RX.4": "The output was harm-free, but introduced some minor regressions in the discussion of readability and documentation use cases.",
    "RX.5": "The agent provided some annotations on source and reason for non-cosmetic changes, but could have been more thorough."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.2": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.85,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent's edits improved the clarity and flow of the text, but did not significantly address conceptual issues or propose reframing.
rationale.R1.2: The agent identified some consistency issues, but did not thoroughly walk the argument chain or propose minimal repairs.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty for several claims, but could have been more explicit about confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The output was mostly within scope with one minor drift (the discussion of schema documentation).
rationale.RX.4: The output was harm-free, but introduced some minor regressions in the discussion of readability and documentation use cases.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provided some annotations on source and reason for non-cosmetic changes, but could have been more thorough.
